common.title: <h><m1><nw>Servant Levels</nw></m1> <s>to</s> <m2><nw>Items Required</nw></m2></h><h><m3><nw>Items Required</nw></m3> <s>to</s> <m4><nw>Quest Runs</nw></m4></h>
common.material-calculator-description: Calculates total items required from servants you want to level.
common.farming-solver-description: Calculates the most efficient combination of quest runs from items you want to collect.
common.item-list-description: Drop rates in quests for each item.
common.cloud-description: Saves input data to server linked to your Google account.
common.local-backup-description: Save your data as a file (JSON) to your own device. Use this if you prefer not to use Cloud Save or for offline backups.
common.import-confirm: This will overwrite your current data. Are you sure?
common.import-error: Failed to read file. Please select a valid backup file.
common.cloud-load-confirm-message: Loading data from cloud. Your current data will be overwritten. Are you sure?
common.auto-load-success: Automatically loaded the latest data from cloud

farming.集めたいアイテムの数を最低1つ入力してください。: Input at least 1 number of items.
farming.集めたいアイテムの数: The number of items to farm
farming.本当にリセットしますか？: Do you really want to reset the form?
farming.you-can-use-export: You can save form values to the server using "Cloud Save".
farming.新しく追加された素材のためドロップ率のデータがない場合などがあります。: There may be no drop data because the item is newly added.
farming.フォームの入力内容を他のデバイスやブラウザとやり取りできます。: You can import/export form inputs from/to other devices or browsers.
farming.export-device-description: Bookmark this page by browsers with bookmarks sync such as Chrome or Safari. After that, open the bookmark in the device you want to import data.
farming.export-browser-description: Copy this page's URL to another browser.
farming.tooltip-cost: Estimated cost based on 168 SQ for ¥10,000 pack (totalAP÷144÷168×10000 yen)
farming.tooltip-ap: AP cost per run of this quest
farming.tooltip-lap: Number of runs required for this quest
farming.グラフからも除外されます。共有済みの結果ページは引き続き閲覧できます。: It will also be excluded from charts. Shared result pages will remain accessible.

material.表示するアイテムがありません。: There are no items to show.
material.周回数を求める対象: Target items to calculate for farming

dashboard.目標が設定されていません: No targets set. Please set targets from the servant list.
dashboard.wizard-q1-title: What would you like to do?
dashboard.どのサーヴァントを育てたいですか？: Which servant do you want to train?
dashboard.ap-campaign-delay-note: Campaign info (e.g., AP halve) may take up to ~30 minutes to appear here.

quests.効率ポイントとは: Each material normalized to the best quest (0-1), weighted by your stock & goals, then summed. Filters: gems, denominator (AP/turn), scope (needed/all), reward add-ons (QP/Bond/EXP).
quests.所持数未入力の素材があります: Some materials have no stock entered. Filling them in improves accuracy.
quests.所持数モーダル説明: Enter how many of each material you own. The efficiency favors materials you still need. Blank counts as 0 owned.
quests.ストック目標OFF説明: If the surplus is within this amount, it's still considered a secondary candidate (lower priority) in the efficiency ranking. Turn the switch ON to promote this amount to an actual goal, also reflected in the route solver and the distribution advisor.
quests.ストック目標ON説明: On top of the training requirement, this amount is treated as an actual goal and reflected in the efficiency ranking, route solver, and distribution advisor. You can set it per category.
quests.ストック目安説明: Rough guide: skill-maxing and fully ascending one 5★ needs about — Common 20/50/100, Gems 51 each, Monuments/Pieces 17 each (per item type). Defaults are ~3× that (≈3 servants of stock).

events.イベント一覧説明: Plan your box lottery runs: calculate currency needed, boxes to open, and farming laps.
events.このイベントのデータはまだ取り込まれていません: Event ID {{eventId}} data has not been imported yet.
events.データ未取得の説明: The GitHub Actions job will import event data periodically (may take up to 1 day).
events.欲しい素材説明: Enter how many of each box/shop item you want; the minimum boxes, currency, and runs are reverse-calculated.
events.ロスター未設定時の説明: Set training goals in the servant list to reverse-calculate target boxes from your material shortfall. When not logged in, use "By Desired Items" or "Box Count".
events.手入力ドロップ説明: Atlas drop data not yet available. Enter currency drops per run.
events.育成カバー率説明: % of your material shortfall covered by this event
events.残余不足説明: {{count}} materials still needed — collect via free quests.
events.交換所在庫上限警告タイトル: Some shop items are capped by stock limit
events.ドロップデータなし説明: No drop data available. Enter drops per run in the manual input field to calculate.
events.確定ドロップ内訳注記: Box rewards and farming drops are shown separately. Coverage uses the combined total.
